\section{Detailed AI Usage: Per Figure and Per Table}
\label{app:ai_detail}

\noindent This appendix provides granular disclosure of AI assistance for every
figure and table in the thesis, satisfying the doctoral programme's requirement
for transparent declaration of AI tool usage. Three AI-used categories appear:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=2pt]
  \item \textbf{Yes} --- AI generated LaTeX/TikZ scaffold; author specified
        content, structure, and reviewed/validated output.
  \item \textbf{Partial} --- AI assisted with formatting only; primary
        artefact created by author's Python code (matplotlib/seaborn).
  \item \textbf{No} --- Pure author work; no AI involvement in generation.
\end{itemize}

\noindent The author retains full intellectual ownership and responsibility
for accuracy, originality, and academic integrity of all listed items.
